title: Better Diamond Texture
description: Changes the diamond to be much more realistically shaped, with slightly tweaked colours but still keeping the vanilla feel.
body:
![Pack Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d46376d676535f0ed690b72697ba4f631fb0148b.png)
# Description
This pack changes the diamond texture to be much more realistic by changing the shape to be similar to real life. It also tweaks the colours slightly to match better with vanilla without the new texture feeling too out of place - which is what this pack is centered around.

**Please note that this pack only changes the item texture. Nothing else.**
